name: io.github.drift-guard/driftguard
description: Offline JSON/MCP schema diff and hosted API drift monitoring connector (driftguard.org).

environmentVariables.name: DRIFTGUARD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pro/Team API key (dg_…) for hosted monitoring tools

environmentVariables.name: DRIFTGUARD_API
environmentVariables.description: Hosted API base URL (default: driftguard.org). Non-default values require DRIFTGUARD_ALLOW_CUSTOM_API.

environmentVariables.name: DRIFTGUARD_ALLOW_CUSTOM_API
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow a non-default DRIFTGUARD_API (prevents Bearer token exfil via hostile MCP config)
